title: Add gateway-level Meshtastic adapter thread end-to-end ztest
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.5 covers the board-agnostic dispatcher and BLE session primitives separately, but does not have a single test that drives the gateway Meshtastic adapter thread through BLE write, dispatch, disconnect=true, and BLE queue cleanup. What needs to be done: add a native_sim/ztest harness or refactorable test hook that exercises BLE ToRadio write -> gateway adapter processing -> FromRadio response and disconnect cleanup without requiring physical BLE hardware. Acceptance criteria: test proves session-scoped disconnect clears RX/TX/read queues, stale responses are dropped, and no raw Meshtastic RF path is invoked.
notes:
Implemented no-hardware gateway thread ztest coverage. Added a production-shared process_once_internal() used by the real Meshtastic adapter thread and exposed through gateway_meshtastic_adapter_test_process_once() under CONFIG_ZTEST. In ztest builds the background thread is not started, making the harness deterministic while testing the same loop body. Added a fake BLE ToRadio queue with write-time session epochs and production-like reset semantics; fake reset/disconnect clears FromRadio and ToRadio queues. Added tests for BLE ToRadio heartbeat write -> process_once -> FromRadio queueStatus, idle process_once, polite disconnect clearing queued responses while preserving active connection until BLE callback, and disconnect-during-enqueue dropping stale response. No raw Meshtastic RF path is invoked; text ingress remains unsupported through the existing queueStatus path.

Fixes during review: added non-ZTEST adapter_thread prototype; changed fake ToRadio queue to store write-time epochs; aligned fake ble_meshtastic_reset_session_if_epoch with production by preserving active connection while clearing queues; made disconnect-on-next-enqueue clear both fake queue directions.

Local checks: git diff --check PASS.

EC2 direct native_sim validation on i-05e27e074db786e22 with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr, worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-9c4y6: west build -p always -b native_sim lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-9c4y6/lichen && west build -t run => PASS, meshtastic_gateway_adapter 15/15. Initial EC2 run failed because the EC2 test prj.conf was stale and missing already-local CONFIG_LICHEN_APP_INTERFACE lines; fixed by syncing full test directory. Later warning-only run showed unused ztest thread symbols and missing ble_meshtastic_session_active prototype; fixed. Final direct run had no compile warnings from this patch; runtime native ethernet zeth warning is pre-existing/native_sim environment behavior.

EC2 Twister: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_ble -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-meshtastic-thread --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-9c4y6/lichen => PASS, 4/4 configurations, 89 test cases, 0 skips, 0 warnings. twister-out-meshtastic-thread was not committed.

Review outcomes: Planck the 3rd: no P0-P2 findings. Archimedes the 3rd found P2 fake semantics issues for reset_session_if_epoch and ToRadio write-time epoch; fixed. Linnaeus the 3rd found P1 missing adapter_thread prototype and P2 fake epoch/queue-clear issues; fixed. Lorentz the 3rd narrow re-review after fixes: no P0-P2 findings.
close_reason: Added native_sim gateway-level Meshtastic adapter process-once ztest coverage for BLE ToRadio write dispatch, disconnect cleanup, stale response dropping, and idle processing. Direct native_sim and Twister passed; reviews completed and findings fixed.
